zh.lifeSummary: Lady Mabilia de Redvers於大約1114年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾。她和Lord Richard De Grey Lord Of Rotherfield至少有1個兒子。她去世於1143年享年30歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Redvers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Reviers in Calvados (France).

nameMeanings.name: Mabilia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Carmine, Carmino, Domenico, Luciano, Nicola.
Italian: altered form of Mabilia, from the old female personal name Mabile, from Latin Amabilis.

en.lifeSummary: Lady Mabilia de Redvers was born about 1114, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. She had at least 1 son with Lord Richard De Grey Lord Of Rotherfield. She died in 1143, at the age of 30.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Mabilia de Redversは約1114年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアで生まれた。彼女はLord Richard De Grey Lord Of Rotherfieldとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1143年に30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Mabilia de Redvers(은)는 대략 1114년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Lord Richard De Grey Lord Of Rotherfield(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1143년 30세의 나이로 사망했다.
